The #617 init=0 fix stopped the CRASH but the sub-total computed as blank/NOTAPPL (silent wrong value). Root cause (proven via debug errmsg reading Q157 at runtime): (1) in a DisplayTogether amount matrix the NOT-consumed items' amount-gate preprocs never run -> their amounts stay notappl (display 0 but var is notappl); (2) `if X=notappl then X=0` does NOT work in CSPro (notappl=notappl is falsy) so the coalesce never fired -> one notappl term made the whole sum notappl.
